headline: ICE Mortgage Monitor: April Home Prices Posted Strongest Monthly Gain in Nearly Two Years
summary: ATLANTA & NEW YORK, May 11, 2026--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, today released its May 2026 ICE Mortgage Monitor report. The analysis found that U.S. home prices rose 0.32% in April on a seasonally adjusted basis — the strongest single-month gain in nearly two years. headline: ICE Expands its VaR-Based Portfolio Margining Methodology ICE Risk Model 2 to U.S. ERCOT Power
summary: LONDON & NEW YORK, May 11, 2026--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, and home to the largest and most liquid markets in the world to trade and clear energy derivatives, today announced that ICE has expanded its Value-at-Risk (VaR)-based portfolio margining methodology, IRM 2, to ICE’s U.S. ERCOT power markets.
